name: insurance underwriters processing 5–15 claims/month tool
description: For insurance underwriters processing 5–15 claims/month, discrepancies cause financial losses. We automate the flagging of discrepancies instead of manual review of claims.
problem_solved: discrepancies between policy terms and submitted claims
